'''Yalln''' was a terrestrial [[Factory world/Legends|industrial world]]<ref name="AIR" /> situated in the [[Yalln system/Legends|Yalln system]], a part of the [[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It featured corporate complexes, outside of which stretched vast [[Colonist/Legends|unsettled]] territories.<ref name="AIR" />

The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Clenna]] [[Homeworld/Legends|grew up]] on Yalln, spending a lot of [[Time/Legends|time]] during his youth [[Scout/Legends|exploring]] the wilderness outside the corporate complexes with his trusty [[Tal (creature)|''tal'']]. At some point, Clenna traveled offworld and served in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but he eventually returned to Yalln. He grew both restless and tired of his life there, however, and ultimately joined the offworld [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]] as a staff member<ref name="AIR" /> at some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Yalln was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Yalln [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world itself, in grid square R-5.<ref name="TEA" />
